Feature.subtitle: I create modern websites and apps with that underground touch

About.title: About me:
About.description:
Full-Stack Developer with focus on Front-End, working on the creation of web applications and modern digital solutions, with focus on performance, usability and user experience.

I mainly work with React and Next.js in building modern applications, websites, landing pages and web systems, integrated with APIs, backend services in Node.js and microservice-based architectures, using artificial intelligence tools to optimize productivity, code analysis and solution delivery.

Currently training in Information Security, expanding my vision on secure development, data protection and construction of reliable applications.

items.viptechStore: E-commerce developed with Next.js and TypeScript.
items.githubHunter: Next.js project consuming GitHub API to search profiles and repositories.
